description:
cloudstack_ipaddress

Acquires and associates a public IP.

argument_reference.name: is_portable
argument_reference.description: This determines if the IP address should be transferable across zones (defaults false)

argument_reference.name: network_id
argument_reference.description: The ID of the network for which an IP address should be acquired and associated. Changing this forces a new resource to be created.

argument_reference.name: vpc_id
argument_reference.description: The ID of the VPC for which an IP address should be acquired and associated. Changing this forces a new resource to be created.

argument_reference.name: zone
argument_reference.description: The name or ID of the zone for which an IP address should be acquired and associated. Changing this forces a new resource to be created.

argument_reference.name: project
argument_reference.description: The name or ID of the project to deploy this instance to. Changing this forces a new resource to be created. NOTE: network_id and/or zone should have a value when is_portable is false! NOTE: Either network_id or vpc_id should have a value when is_portable is true!

attributes_reference.name: id
attributes_reference.description: The ID of the acquired and associated IP address.

attributes_reference.name: ip_address
attributes_reference.description: The IP address that was acquired and associated.
